description: As the occupational health physician for Ana Isabel Betz (PUID: GNU777ORG), a veteran cotton mill worker presenting with 'chest tightness' and 'cough' suggesting Byssinosis, document her case in GNU Health. Add an active diagnosis of Byssinosis (ICD-10 code J66 or J66.0) and create a clinical evaluation recording her symptoms in the chief complaint. Order at least two diagnostic tests, prescribe a respiratory medication, and schedule a follow-up appointment for 14 to 30 days from today. Login credentials: username 'admin', password 'gnusolidario'.
